SQLLite.SQL:
SELECT EO1.ORDER_TYPE_ID AS "CoOrderTypeId" , CE.CO_EVENT_SEQ AS "CoEventSeq" , CE.EVENT_DATE AS "EventDate" , CE.RECEIPT_DATE AS "ReceiptDate" , CE.STD_EVENT_ID AS "StandardEventId" , CE.CO_NUMBER AS "CoNumber" FROM EVENT_OUTPUTS EO1 , CO_EVENTS CE , CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO WHERE EO1.ISSUE_STAGE = 'CO' AND CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.courtId} AND CO.CO_NUMBER = CE.CO_NUMBER AND EO1.STD_EVENT_ID = ${param.eventId} AND CE.STD_EVENT_ID = EO1.STD_EVENT_ID AND CE.PROCESS_STAGE = 'AUTO' AND CE.STD_EVENT_ID != 174 AND EO1.CODE = ( SELECT MAX (EO.CODE) FROM EVENT_OUTPUTS EO WHERE EO.ISSUE_STAGE = 'CO' AND EO.STD_EVENT_ID = ${param.eventId} ) UNION
SELECT EO.ORDER_TYPE_ID AS "CoOrderTypeId" , CE.CO_EVENT_SEQ AS "CoEventSeq" , CE.EVENT_DATE AS "EventDate" , CE.RECEIPT_DATE AS "ReceiptDate" , CE.STD_EVENT_ID AS "StandardEventId" , CE.CO_NUMBER AS "CoNumber" FROM EVENT_OUTPUTS EO , CO_EVENTS CE , CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO WHERE EO.ISSUE_STAGE = 'CO' AND CO.CO_NUMBER = CE.CO_NUMBER AND CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.courtId} AND CE.STD_EVENT_ID = ${param.eventId} AND CE.STD_EVENT_ID = 174 AND EO.STD_EVENT_ID = CE.STD_EVENT_ID AND CE.PROCESS_STAGE = 'AUTO' AND EO.ORDER_TYPE_ID = CE.REPORT_VALUE_1
ORDER BY "CoNumber"

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin cpSuper
